name: Seiko Corporation
summary: Seiko Corporation engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of automatic liquid filling machines and cold forged parts in Japan. The company's packaging machines include container aligners, lincers/air cleaners, filling and winding machines, cappers, cap aligners, pouch filling systems, and robot systems, as well as self-fit series. It also trades in FA systems; energy monitoring systems; industrial robot systems; video surveillance and security systems; air conditioning/refrigeration equipment and related parts; ventilation equipment; power generation equipment; cleaning vehicles; lifting equipment; and parking systems, as well as tires for trucks and buses, passenger cars, industrial vehicles, and motorcycles. Seiko Corporation was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Shizuoka, Japan.
